title: Verify force-with-lease retry on rerun push
description: Verify force-with-lease retry when push is rejected during rerun. This is a P3T19 test: find an issue with a previously-pushed branch (stale ref), fire @kody on it to trigger the ship stage, and confirm the engine retries with `git push --force-with-lease -u origin HEAD`. Prior runs 1937 and 1773 both hit remote rejection at ship — this run should either succeed on retry or produce logs demonstrating the force-with-lease retry attempt. No code changes to this repo; the engine lives in aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine.
